race.description: Rmbl Investments Rising Stars Race Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: Open race for the apprentices. GARNACHO (6) is a consistent type who has been close up in his past two at this track over 1400m. He looks suited rising in trip now from an ideal draw and should be right there in the finish. TEL AVIV (9) was a dominant winner two back at Wangaratta, solid again over this route last time out. She'll be up on speed and should be very hard to run down. LOTS OF TIME (8) won here two back before an even effort at Cranbourne when working home for fourth. She should be thereabouts again. QUEENSBURY (3) is knocking on the door and up in trip looks okay, she should be right there again.
